WebLink.url:
/lightning/o/How_To__kav/new?defaultFieldValues=Title=Format:Action A fails with “error string”.Example:ManagedVolume Begin_Snapshot fails with "Cannot make managedVolume writable",Environment__c=List relevant technologies and versions

Rubrik CDM5.2.1-p2(do not use build version)
Rubrik Security Cloud,Cause__c=Insert text here:a short paragraph describing the cause.KEEP IT SHORT.
Example:Global Protection was engaged which stopped the backup from running.,Resolution__c=TIP:If a bug is involved and it has fixes in CDM but also a workaround;list out like so:
Code Fix
Upgrade to CDM xxxx which contains a fix.
Workaround
Insert workaround here if customer can implement.If not; insert in INTERNAL notes.,Notes__c=Mostly for tech contact information
ALSO:if an RBK KB needs more information it goes into this section.,Internal_comments__c=Note;this section is NOT visible to customers on portal.It is only for Rubrik staff through SalesForce access.,JIRA_Reference__c=Insert URL to relevant JIRA here.,Summary__c=Insert text here;sum up the symptoms here and list out the error; picture;sample from Web UI or log.
-ALWAYS look for existing knowledgeFIRST
-Is there an RBK[1-8]message in case/logs/error?>RBK KB MUST be updated(don't write a new KB; use NOTES section).
-RBK[9];search for an existing article;create the article if it is non-existant.
-Do not use “we; you; customer”.
-Specify log location(/var/log/job-fetcher/).
-Don't use abbreviations such as RSC;JFL.
If needed:contact KCS:kcs-feedback
